message:
fix(combinator): prevent barging in bulkhead/rate-limiter, clamp circuit breaker threshold

Bulkhead:
- try_acquire() now checks pending_queue_count before and inside the CAS
  loop to prevent fast-path callers from barging ahead of queued waiters,
  preserving FIFO fairness under contention

Rate limiter:
- try_acquire() now holds a read lock on wait_queue and rejects if
  non-empty, preventing barging past queued operations. The queue lock
  is properly dropped after token acquisition.

Circuit breaker:
- Clamp success_threshold to 0xFFFF (16 bits) during construction since
  it is packed into 16 bits in State::HalfOpen. Values exceeding 0xFFFF
  would wrap around and trap the breaker in HalfOpen permanently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
